# Hi-Tech Doors

> Port Elizabeth's trusted garage door specialists since 1997. We supply, install and repair sectional doors, roll-up garage doors, industrial roller shutters, aluminium window shutters and full gate automation across the Eastern Cape.

## Business Information

- **Company:** Hi-Tech Doors (PTY) LTD
- **Established:** 1997
- **Phone:** (041) 365-3996
- **Email:** hitechdoors@absamail.co.za
- **Address:** 6 7th Avenue, Newton Park, Newton Park, Port Elizabeth (Gqeberha), 6045
- **Service Area:** Port Elizabeth and surrounding Eastern Cape

## Products & Services

- Sectional garage doors (aluminium Alu-Lux zinc range, timber range, steel panel, glass fibre)
- Roll-up garage doors (standard and custom/non-standard sizes)
- Industrial roller shutters (warehouses, factories, retail premises)
- Aluminium window shutters
- Door and gate automation (Hydro Doors, DigidoorIII, Gemini, Superdrive, ET Systems, Slimdrive)
- After-sales service and repairs on all supplied products

## Brands

- **Doors:** Timbercon, Superdoors, Wispeco
- **Automation:** Hydro Doors, DigidoorIII, Gemini, Superdrive, ET Systems, Slimdrive

## About

Hi-Tech Doors has been supplying and installing garage doors in Port Elizabeth since 1997. Every installation is carried out by our own dedicated team of employees. We serve residential and commercial clients across the Eastern Cape.
